author: han0110
content:
I think you mean the `ews.yaml` in `ethereum-package`?

Actually that no longer works with the published latest zkboost image, since EWS and zkboost is reworked a bit, now we only need zkboost (and Ere) to be integrated, open a PR here to update the test case https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1338.
